title: Drifting snag, mountains of Kachemak Bay State Park Wilderness area, Homer Spit, Homer, Alaska
description: Snow-capped mountains of Kachemak Bay State Park seen from Homer Spit with a drifting tree snag in the dark water foreground. Winter marine scene showing the bay's open water and the wilderness beyond.
alt: Snow-capped Kachemak Bay mountains seen from Homer Spit with a drifting tree snag in the foreground
verifiedBySession: 2026-04-12 — WebFetch of Flickr photo page confirmed schema.org license field points to creativecommons.org/licenses/by/2.0/ (not the Flickr ARR fallback). File visually matches the Kachemak Bay / Homer Spit subject.
